description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and a red-painted grip at the lower end. The axe head is metallic, with a broad, flat cutting edge on one side and a pointed, wedge-like poll on the opposite side, both painted red except for the exposed steel blade. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting. The red paint on the head and handle tip provides both visual distinction and potential rust protection. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or emergency use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or maintenance sheds. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the axe.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a red-painted steel head, featuring a broad blade and pointed poll. The handle has a red grip at the base and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved wooden handle, red grip, and the broad steel blade with a red-painted head.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the red paint on the head and grip visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the handle's curvature and the pointed poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear edge-on view showing the back of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, red-painted grip at the base, oval cross-section, ergonomic for gripping.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a flat edge and a pointed poll, red-painted except for the cutting edge, no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
